bridge_instructions: Implement routine status output for Bridge queue processing. Add outputs that Codex can publish back to aevespers2/Bridge so ChatGPT can see accepted, rejected, processed, and blocked requests after each run. Recommended files: queues/chatgpt_codex_processed.jsonl, queues/chatgpt_codex_rejected.jsonl, reports/latest_bridge_run.json. Update import_bridge_queue.py or add a companion export script so the main GIS repo can write a structured status report after processing. Preserve provenance and do not modify evidence outputs directly from Bridge requests.
